name: cmo-agent-bridge
description: Plan and operate live CMO battles or build and test CMO scenarios through a local stdio MCP bridge.

interface.shortDescription: Command live operations or author CMO scenarios.
interface.longDescription: Connect Codex to a running Command: Modern Operations scenario through a local Lua and file bridge. In live-player mode, assess the player-visible battlespace, compare courses of action, build synchronized missions, task pools, packages, moving areas, flight plans, TOT and tanker plans, then assess execution. In scenario-author mode, build forces and missions, edit scenario settings, sides, events, special actions and scoring, and conduct controlled playtests without mixing author omniscience into fair play.
defaultPrompt: Assess the live CMO battlespace and recommend a plan.
Build and verify a synchronized CMO package with flight and tanker plans.
Help me author and playtest a CMO scenario with events and scoring.
